title: I Can Support Them and Still Be Supported
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that supporting ageing parents and building your own security are mutually exclusive
excerpt: A short energy statement for the fear that caring for parents financially will undermine what you've built. The release names the scarcity behind that fear; the allow names the truth that care and security can coexist.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when supporting ageing parents financially triggers anxiety about your own financial future, or when giving to them feels like taking from yourself.

content.text: A short energy statement for the belief that there is only so much — and that giving some to your parents removes it from yourself. The release names that scarcity belief; the allow names the alternative: that care and security can be held at the same time.

I am ready to release the belief that supporting my parents will undo my security, that care and stability are mutually exclusive, or that giving to them means taking from myself. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow a financial life in which I genuinely care for my parents and genuinely protect my own security — not instead of each other, but alongside. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
